warm_up:
Activation & Mobilisation Drills:
1 round PVC pipe
30sec e/s PVC Shoulder Opener
3 PVC Pass Throughs
3 PVC Around the Worlds each way
10 Worlds Greatest Stretch
10 Band Row Rotate Press
2 rounds (PVC/Barbell):
3 Muscle Clean
3 Hang Power Clean
3 Tall Clean
10 Strict Press

strength.name: Clean Pull
strength.description:
1x3 | * 3 count to knee
* Focus on hip pop & Triple Extension
* Shrug and let elbows float | Work Up to a Top Set of 3. Increase weight if it is feeling good or dial it in for another set.
00:00 3
02:00 3
04:00 3
06:00 3

strength.name: Clean
strength.description:
4x3 | * If you catch high, squat it
* Focus on triple extension
* Fast Elbows | E3MOM 15min
BUILD 1 Sets
00:00 3 @ 65%
HOLD 4 Sets
03:00 3 @ 75%
06:00 3 @ 75%
09:00 3 @ 75%
12:00 3 @ 75%

metcon.name: Workout
metcon.description:
E3MOM x 12
200m Run
5 Squat cleans @ 80/50kg
Cycle all 5 or quick singles
record your fastest round

hypertrophy.reasoning: Today taxes quads, shoulders, and core heavily; build posterior chain and arms without competing for recovery.

siri_text: Wednesday's workout. Strength: Clean Pull, 1 by 3. Strength: Clean, 4 by 3 at 75 percent. Metcon: EMOM: 200m Run, 5 Squat cleans @ 80/50kg. For hypertrophy, focus on Back (Rows), Hamstrings, Glutes.
